title: Kavel Mesa
content:
{{Top|leg|notoc=1}} {{Youmay|the Rebel officer|[[Mesa Greenbark]] or [[Mesa 291]]}} {{Character |type=Rebel |image=[[File:KavelMesa.jpg]] |name=Kavel Mesa |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]][[Star Wars (1977) 58|''Star Wars'' (1977) 58]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Captain Mesa—good luck. A lot depends on you."
"Don't worry, Princess, we'll keep everythin' shipshape an' runnin' smooth!|Leia Organa and Kavel Mesa|}} [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Kavel Mesa''' was Chief Logistics Officer for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] [[Haven Base]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Arbra/Legends|Arbra]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. One of the main point-men running the construction of Haven Base within a large system of caverns,{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030605arbra1|series=Arbra: Sanctuary In the Storm|text=Part 1: Hole in the Ground}} in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Mesa was placed in charge of a special project that involved using five [[Kerts-Bhrg field generator]]s to create a protective environmental field around the Rebel fleet. Mesa reported directly to Rebel leader [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], who hoped the novel experiment could allow the Alliance to effectively hide their ships within the chromosphere of the nearby [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Arbran]]. During the fields' initial testing phase, an absorption circuit overloaded and the command center on the control generator was filled with noxious gas. Captain Mesa and several members of the maintenance crew passed out for a brief period of time before the circuit could be repaired. ==Behind the scenes== Kavel Mesa appeared in [[Star Wars (1977) 58|''Star Wars'' 58]], written by [[David Michelinie]], illustrated by [[Walter Simonson]] and released in [[1982]]. There is significant confusion about Mesa's rank across his various mentions in the ''[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]'' continuity. Both the [[Wizards of the Coast]] supplement ''[[Arbra: Sanctuary In the Storm]]'' and ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' refer to Mesa as both a Captain and a [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]], just several sentences apart from each other.''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' However, as Mesa's original appearance in ''Star Wars'' 58 refers to him as a Captain, for the purposes of this article he is referred to as such. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 58|''Star Wars'' (1977) 58]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 58}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030605arbra1|series=Arbra: Sanctuary In the Storm|text=Part 1: Hole in the Ground}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Kavel Mesa }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Mesa, Kavel}} [[Category:Alliance Military officers]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]]
